app.name: MCO
app.footer: MCO v1.0 · CCQ Railway · Vale S.A.
auth.acessoRestrito: Restricted access. You do not have permission to access this page.
error.title: Something went wrong
validator.problema.bloqueio.vazio.dica: State WHAT happens, WHERE, and HOW OFTEN.
validator.problema.bloqueio.semNumero: Your problem is not yet measurable.
validator.problema.bloqueio.semNumero.di: Include a number. Example: "25% of events occur when taking over the locomotive" or "4 unplanned stops per month".
validator.problema.aviso.causa: It seems there is a CAUSE mixed in with the problem.
validator.problema.aviso.causa.dica: Describe only WHAT happens, not WHY. The cause comes in Step 4.
validator.problema.aviso.generico: Vague description. The problem must be specific.
validator.problema.aviso.generico.dica: Specify: which equipment? which operation? what frequency?
validator.meta.bloqueio.naoSmart.dica: SMART format: "Reduce [indicator] from [X] to [Y] by [date]". Example: "Reduce errors from 10 to 0 by 01/28/2026".
validator.causa.bloqueio.vazia.dica: Use 5 Whys: why did it happen? And why that? Keep going until you find a cause the system can fix.
validator.causa.bloqueio.proibida: You are attacking a SYMPTOM, not a CAUSE. "{causa}" is not a root cause.
validator.causa.bloqueio.proibida.dica: Ask: "Why {causa}?" until you find something the SYSTEM can fix.
validator.causa.aviso.comportamental: Cause seems behavioral. Look for the SYSTEMIC cause behind it.
validator.causa.aviso.comportamental.dic: Why didn't the person do it? Does the procedure exist? Is it clear? Does the system allow the error?
validator.contramedida.bloqueio.vazia.di: The action must directly eliminate the identified root cause.
validator.contramedida.aviso.fraca: "{acao}" is a weak action. It may not solve the root cause.
validator.contramedida.aviso.fraca.dica: Prefer actions that change the SYSTEM: poka-yoke, process redesign, automation, visual signaling, physical barrier.
validator.resultado.bloqueio.semComparac: Record: indicator BEFORE the countermeasure vs. indicator AFTER.
validator.resultado.aviso.semEvidencia.d: Attach a photo or document proving the result.
validator.resultado.aviso.metaNaoAtingid: Goal was not achieved. It may be necessary to go back to Step 4.
If the goal was not achieved, reassess: was the root cause correct? Was the countermeasure fully implemented?
pedagogico.passo1.pergunta: What is happening and how often?
pedagogico.passo1.criterio: Factual problem with numerical indicator and defined scope.
pedagogico.passo1.bom: 90% of events with travel engineers occur when taking over and inspecting the locomotive.
pedagogico.passo1.ruim: There is operational risk on the permanent way.
pedagogico.passo2.pergunta: Where exactly is the problem most concentrated?
pedagogico.passo2.criterio: Prioritized problem with data: where, when, who, how much.
pedagogico.passo2.erro1: Jumping straight to cause without breaking down
pedagogico.passo2.bom: Of 10 errors: 7 are in special orders (sauce) and 3 in routine orders.
pedagogico.passo3.pergunta: How much do you want to improve and by when?
pedagogico.passo3.criterio: SMART goal: Specific, Measurable, with deadline.
pedagogico.passo3.bom: Reduce delivery errors from 10 to 0 by 01/28/2026.
pedagogico.passo4.pergunta: Why does the problem happen? (5x Why?)
pedagogico.passo4.criterio: Systemic cause identified via 5 Whys or Ishikawa. CANNOT be human error.
pedagogico.passo4.erro3: Not validating the cause with data
pedagogico.passo4.bom: The text "balsamic sauce" is not highlighted on the TV screen as a special order.
pedagogico.passo5.pergunta: What system change eliminates the root cause?
pedagogico.passo5.criterio: Systemic action that directly attacks the root cause. Evaluated by S/Q/L/C.
pedagogico.passo5.erro3: Action not linked to root cause
pedagogico.passo5.bom: Put "balsamic sauce" text blinking on the screen.
pedagogico.passo5.ruim: Retrain employees in the selection process.
pedagogico.passo6.criterio: Each action with responsible person, deadline, and status.
pedagogico.passo6.erro1: Action without a defined responsible person
pedagogico.passo6.bom: Request software change — John (Systems) — by Feb 15 — Done.
pedagogico.passo6.ruim: The team will solve the problem.
pedagogico.passo7.pergunta: Did the process improve? Was the goal achieved?
pedagogico.passo7.criterio: Before/after comparison with data. Photographic evidence.
pedagogico.passo7.bom: Before: 10 errors/month. After: 0 errors in 30 visits. Goal achieved
pedagogico.passo8.pergunta: Has the new standard been documented? Where can it be replicated?
pedagogico.passo8.criterio: Updated procedure + replication plan for other areas.
pedagogico.passo8.bom: SWI modified. Replicate system and SWI in all stores.
pedagogico.completePasso: Complete the current step before advancing.
reaction.saudavel.progress1: Good work. Another requirement completed, keep it up.
reaction.saudavel.progress2: Consistent progress. The team is on the right track.
reaction.saudavel.progress3: Requirement met. You're maintaining the pace.
reaction.desorganizado.progress1: Good — now keep that focus. Less discussion, more evidence.
reaction.desorganizado.progress2: Requirement completed. Follow this direction: objective → evidence → next.
reaction.desorganizado.progress3: That's real progress. Repeat: field, data, record.
reaction.passivo.progress1: Great! The project is moving again. Don't let it stop.
reaction.passivo.progress2: Requirement completed. Seize the momentum and tackle the next one.
reaction.passivo.progress3: The project was stalled and now has progress. Keep going.
reaction.travado.progress1: Finally unblocked. Check if other blockers follow the same logic.
reaction.travado.progress2: Requirement completed. This may indicate the approach changed — good sign.
reaction.travado.progress3: Progress after stagnation. Check if the root cause is correct.
reaction.individual.progress1: Requirement completed. Now distribute: the next one must be from someone else.
reaction.individual.progress2: Progress, but remember: CCQ is collective. Who else can contribute?
reaction.individual.progress3: Good. But the work can't be done by one person alone.
reaction.desorganizado.noProgress1: You're discussing without method. Stop, reread the checklist, and do one thing at a time.
reaction.desorganizado.noProgress2: The team has energy but is scattered. Define: who does what by when.
reaction.desorganizado.talkOnly1: Too much talk, too little delivery. MASP requires evidence, not opinions. Go back to the field.
reaction.desorganizado.talkOnly2: The chat is full and the checklist is empty. Reverse that priority.
reaction.desorganizado.phase4: The analysis is getting lost. Redo the Ishikawa with data, not assumptions.
reaction.passivo.noProgress1: The project stopped. Leader, call the group and redistribute tasks.
reaction.passivo.noProgress2: No progress for days. Is there an unregistered blocker? Speak up.
reaction.passivo.phase4: The Root Cause phase stopped. Without analysis there's no solution. Resume.
reaction.travado.noProgress1: The group is trying but not advancing. The problem may be the approach: review the analysis.
reaction.travado.noProgress2: Stuck for several days. Ask the facilitator for help — it's not weakness, it's method.
reaction.travado.talkOnly: There's activity but no results. You may be attacking the effect, not the cause.
reaction.travado.phase4a: Root cause probably incorrect. Go back to Gemba, observe the process, redo the 5 Whys.
reaction.travado.phase4b: The Root Cause phase is stuck. This usually means the true cause hasn't been found.
reaction.individual.noProgress: The project is stagnant and only one person is trying. This doesn't work. Leader, redistribute.
reaction.individual.solo1: The project is not individual. CCQ requires team participation. Distribute responsibilities now.
reaction.individual.solo2: Only 1 person executing. The work needs to be split — involve the group.
reaction.individual.phase4: One person alone can't do a good root cause analysis. Bring different perspectives.
reaction.inactivity.saudavel: No recent activity. Check if there's anything pending on the checklist.
reaction.inactivity.desorganizado: The project cooled down after a lot of agitation. When resuming, focus on the checklist, not the chat.
reaction.inactivity.passivo1: The project has been stopped for 3 days. Leader, call a quick meeting.
reaction.inactivity.passivo2: No activity for 72h. The presentation deadline doesn't wait.
reaction.inactivity.passivo3: Project stopped. If there's a blocker, register it. Silence doesn't solve anything.
reaction.inactivity.travado: Stopped after getting stuck. Ask the facilitator for support to unblock.
reaction.inactivity.individual: The project stopped and the only person working on it did too. Distribute before resuming.
reaction.phase2: Step 2 — Break Down. Stratify with Pareto: where, when, how much. Don't advance without prioritizing.
reaction.phase3: Step 3 — SMART Goal. Format: "Reduce [X] from [value] to [value] by [date]". No number, no goal.
reaction.phase4: Step 4 — Root Cause. Use 5 Whys + Ishikawa. FORBIDDEN: "lack of attention", "human error". The cause must be systemic.
reaction.phase5: Step 5 — Countermeasures. Each action must directly attack the root cause. "Retrain" is a weak action.
reaction.phase6: Step 6 — Action Plan. Responsible + deadline for each countermeasure. No "the team will solve it".
reaction.phase7: Step 7 — Verify. Before vs. After with DATA. Goal achieved? If not, go back to Step 4.
reaction.phase8: Step 8 — Standardize & Replicate. Document the new standard. Where else can it be applied?
reaction.requisitosCompletos: All requirements of Phase {fase} completed. The phase can advance.
reaction.faltamRequisitos: Only {count} requirement(s) left to unlock the phase.
reaction.deadline.urgente: URGENT: {dias}d to presentation and {fases} phase(s) remaining. Emergency mode.
reaction.deadline.passivo: {dias}d to presentation and the project is stopped. Mobilize now.
reaction.deadline.desorganizado: {dias}d to presentation. Stop dispersing and focus only on what's mandatory.
reaction.deadline.geral: Less than 7 days to presentation. Focus on the essentials. ({dias}d remaining)
cobranca.lembrete: {nome}, the requirement "{requisito}" has been pending for {dias} days.
cobranca.alerta: Group: {requisito} is {dias} days overdue. {nome} is responsible. The project is blocked.
cobranca.cobranca: Leader: {nome} hasn't delivered "{requisito}" for {dias} days. Project "{projeto}" at risk.
cobranca.escalacao: ESCALATION: Project "{projeto}" stopped for {dias} days. Requirement "{requisito}" without response from {nome}. Intervention needed.
requisito.F1_DESCRICAO_FACTUAL: Factual description of the problem (no opinion, no cause)
requisito.F1_DESCRICAO_FACTUAL.dica: The problem description must be factual. State WHAT happens, not WHY.
requisito.F1_INDICADOR_NUMERICO: Numerical indicator proving the problem (frequency, cost, time)
requisito.F1_INDICADOR_NUMERICO.dica: No number, no problem. How many times did it happen? How much did it cost? How much time was lost?
requisito.F1_ESCOPO.dica: Define exactly WHERE and WHEN the problem occurs. Which equipment? Which line? Which period?
requisito.F1_COMPOSICAO_GRUPO: Registration of group members and leader
requisito.F1_COMPOSICAO_GRUPO.dica: Register all CCQ group members with their roles.
requisito.F2_ESTRATIFICACAO.dica: Stratify data: by shift, by location, by failure type. Where is the problem concentrated?
requisito.F2_DADOS_CAMPO.dica: Data must come from the real field, not estimates. Go measure.
requisito.F2_GRAFICO_CONCENTRACAO: Chart or table showing problem concentration
requisito.F2_GRAFICO_CONCENTRACAO.dica: Build a Pareto or table showing where the problem is most concentrated.
requisito.F2_FOCO_PRIORIZADO: Definition of prioritized focus for attack
requisito.F2_FOCO_PRIORIZADO.dica: Which "piece" of the problem will be attacked first? The group must decide together.
requisito.F2_REUNIAO_DESDOBRAMENTO.dica: The group needs to meet to discuss collected data and define focus.
requisito.F3_META_NUMERICA: Specific numerical goal (e.g.: reduce from 7 to 2 failures/month)
requisito.F3_META_NUMERICA.dica: The goal must have a number. "Reduce from X to Y." No number = rejection.
requisito.F3_PRAZO_META.dica: By when do you plan to achieve this goal? Set a date.
requisito.F3_JUSTIFICATIVA_META: Justification for the chosen goal value
requisito.F3_JUSTIFICATIVA_META.dica: Why this goal and not another? Explain how you arrived at this number.
requisito.F3_APROVACAO_FACILITADOR.dica: The facilitator must approve the goal before proceeding.
requisito.F4_ISHIKAWA.dica: Build the fishbone diagram with possible causes in each category.
requisito.F4_CINCO_PORQUES: Application of 5 Whys on the most probable cause
requisito.F4_CINCO_PORQUES.dica: Apply the 5 Whys on the most probable cause from Ishikawa until reaching the root.
requisito.F4_EVIDENCIA_CAMPO: Field evidence proving the root cause
requisito.F4_EVIDENCIA_CAMPO.dica: The root cause needs proof. Photo, measurement, record. "If that's the cause, how do you prove it?"
requisito.F4_REUNIAO_VALIDACAO: Group meeting to validate root cause
requisito.F4_REUNIAO_VALIDACAO.dica: The entire group must agree this is the root cause. Record the meeting.
requisito.F4_APROVACAO_FACILITADOR.dica: The facilitator must validate the root cause before building the action plan.
requisito.F5_LISTA_ACOES: List of actions in 5W2H format (What, Who, When, Where, Why, How, How much)
requisito.F5_LISTA_ACOES.dica: Each action needs: What? Who? When? One person, one date, one deliverable.
requisito.F5_RESPONSAVEL_INDIVIDUAL: Each action with individual responsible (not "the group")
requisito.F5_RESPONSAVEL_INDIVIDUAL.dica: Each action must have ONE owner. "The group" is not an owner. Who will do it?
requisito.F5_DATA_CONCLUSAO: Each action with expected completion date
requisito.F5_DATA_CONCLUSAO.dica: Every action needs a deadline. When will it be done?
requisito.F5_APROVACAO_FACILITADOR.dica: The facilitator must approve the plan before starting execution.
requisito.F6_ACOES_CONCLUIDAS: All actions marked as completed with actual date
requisito.F6_ACOES_CONCLUIDAS.dica: Each action must be marked as completed with the actual execution date.
requisito.F6_EVIDENCIA_EXECUCAO.dica: Each executed action needs proof: photo, document, record.
requisito.F6_JUSTIFICATIVA_NAO_FEITAS: Justification for incomplete or delayed actions
requisito.F6_JUSTIFICATIVA_NAO_FEITAS.di: If any action wasn't done, justify the reason.
requisito.F6_PERCENTUAL_EXECUCAO.dica: At least 80% of actions must be completed to advance.
requisito.F7_MEDICAO_POS: Post-action indicator measurement (same indicator from Phase 1)
requisito.F7_MEDICAO_POS.dica: Measure the SAME indicator from Phase 1. Before it was X, now it's what?
requisito.F7_COMPARACAO_ANTES_DEPOIS.dic: Build a chart showing the indicator BEFORE and AFTER the actions.
requisito.F7_ATINGIMENTO_META.dica: The goal was to achieve Y. How far did you get? What's the % achievement?
requisito.F7_EFEITOS_COLATERAIS: Side effects analysis (improved X and worsened Y?)
requisito.F7_EFEITOS_COLATERAIS.dica: Improved one thing and worsened another? Check for side effects.
requisito.F8_PADRAO_OPERACIONAL: Updated or created operational standard (formal document)
requisito.F8_PADRAO_OPERACIONAL.dica: The gain must become a standard. Update the operational document or create a new one.
requisito.F8_TREINAMENTO.dica: Who was trained on the new standard? Record names and dates.
requisito.F8_ACOMPANHAMENTO.dica: Who will monitor the indicator going forward? How often?
requisito.F8_LICAO_APRENDIDA: Lesson learned recorded (knowledge for other groups)
requisito.F8_LICAO_APRENDIDA.dica: What did the group learn? Record it so other CCQs don't repeat the same path.
requisito.F8_APROVACAO_FINAL.dica: The facilitator must approve the project closure.
acesso.passo1.bloqueio: Step 1 (Problem) must be filled and measurable.
acesso.passo3.bloqueio: Step 3 (Goal) must be SMART: value + deadline + indicator.
acesso.passo4.bloqueio: Step 4 (Root Cause) must be systemic. Human error is not a root cause.
acesso.passo5.bloqueio: Step 5/6 (Countermeasures) must have at least 1 action.
login.footer: MCO · Operational Continuous Improvement · Vale S.A.
